description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2023 Land Rover Defender 110 SE P400, 3.0TC I6 4WD, 395bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 309,000 or AED 4,841 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 40,146 KM's - Al Tayer Warranty Valid Until 8th August 2028 or 150,000 KM's - Al Tayer Warranty Service Contract Valid Until 8th August 2028 or 65,000 KM's - Full Land Rover Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - 20" Gloss Black Alloy Wheels - Glass Panoramic Sunroof - Large Display Screen - Cruise Control - Dual-Zone Climate Control - Bluetooth Connectivity - Ambient Lighting - Satellite Navigation - Apple CarPlay - Lane Assist - Blind Spot Assist - 360 Surround View Camera
